mapper.sql: id, place_name, tag_content, tag_source, tag_count, update_time
mapper.insert:
insert into place_comment_content_key_word
id,
place_name,
tag_content,
tag_source,
tag_count,
update_time,
#{id,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{placeName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{tagContent,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{tagSource,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{tagCount,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
mapper.update:
update place_comment_content_key_word
place_name = #{placeName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
tag_content = #{tagContent,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
tag_source = #{tagSource,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
tag_count = #{tagCount,jdbcType=INTEGER},
update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}

update place_comment_content_key_word set place_name = #{placeName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, tag_content = #{tagContent,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, tag_source = #{tagSource,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, tag_count = #{tagCount,jdbcType=INTEGER}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}
mapper.insert:
insert into place_comment_content_key_word (id, place_name, tag_content, tag_source, tag_count, update_time ) values
( #{item.id,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.placeName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.tagContent,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.tagSource,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.tagCount,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} )
on duplicate key update tag_count = values(tag_count), update_time = sysdate()
mapper.select: SELECT pi.place_name FROM place_info pi WHERE pi.key_word= #{keyWord} and pi.place_type = #{placeType} AND pi.place_source = #{placeSource}
